ddls:
CREATE TABLE "faculties" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty member */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school the faculty member is affiliated with */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the faculty member belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the faculty member (e.g., Associate Professor, Assistant Professor) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the faculty member */,
  "field_of_specialization" TEXT /* Field of specialization of the faculty member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the faculty member */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the faculty member */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location or room number */,
  "hired_date" TEXT /* Date the faculty member was hired */,
  "education" TEXT /* Educational background of the faculty member */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Detailed research interests and expertise */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the faculty member's profile picture */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current employment status (e.g., active, on leave, retired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculties_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the school */,
  "dean_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dean in charge of the school */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the school */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the school was established */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the school's mission and focus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_dean_id FOREIGN KEY ("dean_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty member who published the work */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the publication was published */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* DOI of the publication */,
  "publication_type" TEXT /* Type of publication (e.g., journal article, book, conference paper) */,
  "co_authors" TEXT /* List of co-authors (JSON array of faculty_id) */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the publication has been cited */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the journal or conference */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_faculty_id FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_id") REFERENCES faculties ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., department administrator, school dean, university administrator) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "status" TEXT /* Account status (e.g., active, suspended, pending approval) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
